items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.content: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.content: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.

items.title: The Bay Area’s animal welfare movement wants to recruit AI
items.summary: In early February, animal welfare advocates and AI researchers gathered in stocking feet at Mox, a scrappy, shoes-free coworking space in San Francisco. Yellow and red canopies billowed overhead, Persian rugs blanketed the floor, and mosaic lamps glowed beside potted plants.  In the common area, a wildlife advocate spoke passionately to a crowd lounging in…

items.title: Meet the former Apple designer building a new AI interface at Hark
items.summary: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."
items.content: The company said it would design models, hardware, and interfaces in tandem to deliver a "seamless end-to-end personal intelligence product."

items.title: Mirage raises $75M to continue building models for its AI video editing app Captions
items.summary: Mirage, the maker of video editing app Captions, has raised $75 million in growth financing from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF).
items.content: Mirage, the maker of video editing app Captions, has raised $75 million in growth financing from General Catalyst's Customer Value Fund (CVF).

items.title: Agile Robots becomes the latest robotics company to partner with Google DeepMind
items.summary: Agile Robots will incorporate Google DeepMind's robotics foundation models into its bots while collecting data for the AI research lab.
items.content: Agile Robots will incorporate Google DeepMind's robotics foundation models into its bots while collecting data for the AI research lab.

items.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
items.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.
items.content: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

items.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.
items.content: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

items.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
items.summary: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.
items.content: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

items.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
items.summary: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.
items.content: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
items.summary: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.
items.content: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

items.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
items.summary: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.
items.content: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

items.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
items.summary: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.
items.content: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

items.title: Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK
items.summary:
Learn how to integrate the Copilot SDK into a React Native app to generate AI-powered issue summaries, with production patterns for graceful degradation and caching.

The post Building AI-powered GitHub issue triage with the Copilot SDK appeared first on The GitHub Blog.

CodeQL and AI‑powered detections work together in GitHub Code Security to identify vulnerabilities across more languages and frameworks.
